description: Chrome browser extension that translates selected text using Grok XAI API with auto-detection of source language and configurable target language

userStories.title: Create extension manifest and project structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the basic Chrome extension structure so the extension can be loaded in the browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Create extension/ directory with manifest.json using Manifest V3 format
Configure permissions: activeTab, storage
Set up content_scripts to run on all URLs (<all_urls>)
Create placeholder files: content/content.js, content/content.css, background/service-worker.js
Create icon placeholders in icons/ directory (icon16.png, icon48.png, icon128.png)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create options page HTML and basic styling
userStories.description: As a user, I want a settings page where I can configure the extension.
acceptanceCriteria: Create options/options.html with form layout
Add input field for API key (type=password)
Add dropdown for target language with options: English, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Portuguese, Italian
Add radio buttons for trigger mode: Automatic vs Button click
Add Save button
Add basic CSS styling for clean appearance
Register options page in manifest.json
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement settings storage functionality
userStories.description: As a user, I want my settings to be saved and persist across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create options/options.js to handle form submission
On save, store apiKey, targetLanguage, and triggerMode to chrome.storage.sync
On page load, retrieve and populate form with saved values
Default targetLanguage to 'English' if not set
Default triggerMode to 'automatic' if not set
Show success message after saving
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create tooltip UI component with CSS isolation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see translations in a clean tooltip that doesn't conflict with page styles.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tooltip element injection in content/content.js using Shadow DOM
Style tooltip in content/content.css with modern appearance (rounded corners, shadow, white background)
Tooltip should support displaying text content and loading state
Tooltip should support displaying error messages
Position tooltip function that keeps it within viewport bounds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement text selection detection
userStories.description: As a user, I want the extension to detect when I select text on any webpage.
acceptanceCriteria: Add mouseup event listener in content/content.js
Capture selected text using window.getSelection()
Ignore empty selections or whitespace-only text
Store selection range for positioning tooltip near selection
Works for both single words and paragraphs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create XAI API translation service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a service to call the Grok XAI API for translations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create background/service-worker.js with translation function
Function accepts: text, targetLanguage, apiKey parameters
Make POST request to https://api.x.ai/v1/chat/completions
Use prompt that instructs auto-detection of source language and returns only translated text
Parse response and return translated text
Handle and return appropriate errors (network, invalid key, rate limit)
Set request timeout to 30 seconds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement message passing between content script and service worker
userStories.description: As a developer, I need content script to communicate with background service worker for API calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Content script sends message with action='translate', text, and targetLanguage
Service worker listens for messages and handles translate action
Service worker retrieves API key from chrome.storage.sync
Service worker returns translation result or error to content script
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement automatic translation mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want translation popup to appear automatically when I select text.
acceptanceCriteria: On text selection, check if triggerMode is 'automatic' from storage
If automatic, immediately show tooltip with loading indicator
Send translation request to service worker
Display translated text in tooltip when response received
Position tooltip near the selected text
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement floating button trigger mode
userStories.description: As a user, I want a small button to appear after selection so I can choose when to translate.
acceptanceCriteria: On text selection, check if triggerMode is 'button' from storage
If button mode, show small translate icon near selection end
Clicking button shows tooltip with loading indicator and triggers translation
Button disappears when clicking elsewhere on page
Button styled with translate icon and hover effect
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement tooltip dismissal behavior
userStories.description: As a user, I want the tooltip to disappear when I click outside or make a new selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Tooltip disappears when clicking outside of it
Tooltip disappears when making a new text selection
Floating button (if shown) disappears when clicking outside
Tooltip does not interfere with page scrolling
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement API key missing error handling
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear feedback when the API key is not configured.
acceptanceCriteria: Before making API call, check if API key exists in storage
If missing, show error in tooltip: 'API key not configured'
Include clickable link/button in tooltip to open extension settings
Do not make API call if key is missing
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement API error handling in tooltip
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see helpful error messages when translation fails.
acceptanceCriteria: Display 'Network error. Please check your connection.' for network failures
Display 'Invalid API key. Please check settings.' for 401 errors
Display 'Too many requests. Please wait a moment.' for 429 errors
Display generic error message for other failures
Error messages styled distinctly (e.g., red text or error icon)
Typecheck passes
